overview: Dealwel Properties is a high-conversion real estate website with a corporate premium design. Features immersive mobile-first shuttle animations, split-layout hero, featured property listings, trust section, investment focus, testimonials, and multi-channel contact zone. Built with Deep Teal and Dark Green brand identity — authoritative, alive, and conversion-focused.
features: Animated hero with split layout, dual CTAs, and search bar (Location, Budget, Type)
Featured property listings grid with hover-lift effects and verified badges
Why Dealwel trust section with 4 value cards and animated stats bar
Investment section with ROI messaging, market metrics, and animated progress bars
Property experience section with virtual tours, neighborhood intel, and ROI calculator cards
Testimonials with social proof and star ratings
Final CTA zone with Call, WhatsApp, and Book Consultation options
Sticky mobile bottom bar with quick-action CTAs
Shuttle (subtle) scroll-triggered animations throughout for immersive mobile experience
Scroll-aware navbar transitioning from transparent to white with shadow
